title: Disambiguate variable references under `with` clauses of `randomize()` methods

features.name: randomize with constraint referencing outer scope via local::
features.description: Code should include a randomize() method call with a with constraint that references class members using local:: scope resolution to disambiguate outer class fields

features.name: randomize with constraint on derived class instance
features.description: Code should include a randomize() method call with a with constraint on a derived class instance where both base and derived classes have rand members with the same name

features.name: randomize with constraint comparing same field from inner and outer scope
features.description: Code should include a randomize() with constraint where a field from the randomized object is compared to the same named field from the outer scope using local:: disambiguation
